def validate_registration(data):
    errors = []
    if not data.get("email"):
        errors.append("email required")
    if not data.get("password"):
        errors.append("password required")
    elif len(data["password"]) < 8:
        errors.append("password too short")
    return errors

def create_user(data):
    password_hash = bcrypt.hashpw(data["password"].encode(), bcrypt.gensalt())
    user = {
        "email": data["email"],
        "password_hash": password_hash,
        "name": data.get("name", ""),
        "created_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
    }
    db = get_database()
    db.execute("INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, name, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
               user["email"], user["password_hash"], user["name"], user["created_at"])
    db.commit()
    return user

def send_welcome_email(user):
    send_email(user["email"], "Welcome!", f"Welcome, {user['name']}!")

def handle_user_registration(request_data):
    errors = validate_registration(request_data)
    if errors:
        return {"error": errors[0]}, 400
    user = create_user(request_data)
    send_welcome_email(user)
    return {"status": "created", "user_id": user["email"]}, 201
